display_text: Refresher Orb, Cost: 5000: Resets cooldowns of all items and abilities (including itself), allowing double cast of ultimates or key spells in a fight. This high-cost, high-impact item enables a second round of crowd control or burst damage. Its long cooldown and significant mana cost commit you to major team fights or objectives. Stats: CD: 180/190/200/210s, Mana Cost: 400, HP Regen: 12, Mana Regen: 6.

display_text: Refresher Orb, Cost: 5000: Provides substantial flat health and mana regeneration (+12 HP/sec, +6 Mana/sec). This sustain helps maintain presence on the map between its long cooldown windows. It provides no primary attributes or damage. Stats: HP Regen: 12, Mana Regen: 6.
search_text: Refresher Orb stats, refresher stats, hp regen item, mana regen item, sustain stats, Refresher Orb attributes, Refresher Orb regen, no damage item, utility stats

display_text: Refresher Orb, Cost: 5000: Team fight winning item that grants a hero a decisive advantage through a second cast of powerful ultimates or disable chains. It dramatically amplifies the impact of heroes with long cooldown, high value abilities, turning a single strong spell into two in rapid succession.
search_text: team fight reset, game winning item, ultimate amplifier, double ultimate, team fight advantage, Refresher Orb team fight, Refresher Orb win condition, fight resetter, Refresher Orb

display_text: Refresher Orb, Cost: 5000: Critical item for heroes whose power is concentrated in long-cooldown ultimates (e.g., Tidehunter, Enigma, Zeus). The massive mana cost requires a sufficient mana pool or regeneration to cast both spells back-to-back. Timing is key—buy it when you have enough mana and survivability to use its effect effectively in a fight.
